---
title: "Power Analysis of Subgroup Representation in Clinical Trials: Evidence from the ACTG 175 Trial"
author: "Susan Peck, Joseph Burks, Jan Blackburn"

abstract: |
  This study evaluates whether subgroup representation in clinical trials provides sufficient statistical power to detect meaningful treatment effects. Using the ACTG 175 trial as a case study, we examine how subgroup size and event counts influence the ability to detect heterogeneity in treatment response.

format:
  pdf:
    pdf-engine: xelatex
    toc: false
    number-sections: true
    fig-pos: H

bibliography: references.bib
link-citations: true

execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

# Introduction

{{< include Child_Intro_v1.qmd >}}

# Data

{{< include Child_Data_v1.qmd >}}

# Methods

{{< include Child_Methods_v1.qmd >}}

# Results

{{< include Child_Results_v1.qmd >}}

# Conclusion

{{< include Child_Conclusion_v1.qmd >}}
